## Checklist
- [ ] `bash scripts/validate.sh` passes (manifests, frontmatter, shellcheck)
- [ ] Hooks/scripts are **fail-open** and bash 3.2-compatible (if touched)
- [ ] No secrets, build artifacts, or third-party names added
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated and version bumped in `plugin.json` (if user-visible)
- [ ] Verifying output pasted below
